nodes.label: AI as quick reference tool for pronunciation and clarity
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable primary source requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I would either use the live voice feature to get the correct pronunciation

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.label_negative: Human-controlled editing and mastering with professional judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I can see the possibility of AI being used to automate the editing and mastering process

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.label_negative: AI as non-threatening tool that cannot replicate human qualities
nodes.grounding_span: Other narrators have a scared or angry view of AI, thinking that it will replace their work

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I couldn't use it as the only source, but I could use it initially, then follow-up with a YouTube video to verify

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: Pronunciation is very crucial in narration

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: ask a specific question to get what I need quickly, then get back to work

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know if AI will be able to replicate the tones, passion, voice acting, range and overall humanness of a narrator

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would use AI for that reason

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: There was one time I came across a pronunciation for a word that didn't seem right...that was not satisfying initially

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I can see the possibility of AI being used to automate the editing and mastering process

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human writers
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know if AI will be able to replicate the tones, passion, voice acting, range and overall humanness of a narrator

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I would use it initially, then follow-up with a YouTube video to verify if it is correct or not

nodes.label: Domain-based compartmentalization of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have detailed conversations with AI at those points
